super_admin.title: Super Admin
super_admin.description: Oversee the platform, client companies, subscriptions, and security controls.

company_admin.title: Company admin
company_admin.description: Run your company's workspace, internal users, and cross-functional operations.

directeur_general.title: General Manager
directeur_general.description: Work from an executive view focused on governance, project steering, and financial arbitration.

directeur_technique.title: Technical Director
directeur_technique.description: Focus on project execution, technical coordination, and field resource availability.

daf.title: Administrative and Finance Director
daf.description: Monitor budgets, treasury, and financial commitments with a strong performance focus.

comptable.title: Accountant
comptable.description: Centralize accounting entries, invoicing, payments, and overdue receivable follow-up.

responsable_rh.title: HR manager
responsable_rh.description: Stay in control of staff, recruiting, assignments, and internal administrative follow-up.

assistant_administratif.title: Administrative assistant
assistant_administratif.description: Centralize correspondence, document compliance, and cross-project read-only follow-up.

responsable_logistique.title: Logistics manager
responsable_logistique.description: Manage procurement, critical stock, and resource allocation toward active projects.

magasinier.title: Warehouse manager
magasinier.description: Track assigned-project stock, alerts, authorized conversations, and personal payroll information.

acheteur.title: Buyer
acheteur.description: Drive tender watch, bid preparation, and submission delivery from one focused workspace.

juriste.title: Legal officer
juriste.description: Review compliance, contractual clauses, and documentary evidence before submission or audit.

controleur_externe.title: External controller
controleur_externe.description: Access cross-functional data in read-only mode for audit, traceability, and risk review.

informaticien.title: IT support
informaticien.description: Monitor accounts, access rights, and application incidents affecting internal teams.

chef_projet.title: Project manager
chef_projet.description: Coordinate planning, teams, and field execution from the project workspace.

ouvrier.title: Worker
ouvrier.description: See your tasks, site instructions, and daily activity tracking in one focused space.

candidat_job_seeker.title: Candidate
candidat_job_seeker.description: Track your profile, open jobs, and application progress from a dedicated candidate workspace.

default.title: Collaborator
default.description: Open your workspace with the modules allowed for your position and permissions.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Application foundations are in place with backend modules, frontend shell, and i18n.
dashboard.platformDescription: Monitor companies, subscriptions, users, and platform-wide alerts.
dashboard.companyDescription: Track your company, staff, and internal operations at a glance.
dashboard.operationalSubtitle: Open the right workspaces first based on the user's operational role and current permissions.
dashboard.quickEntriesSubtitle: The most useful sidebar entries for the active profile, already rewritten in role-specific language.
dashboard.healthHint: Provide token and tenant to display secured module statuses.

companyAdmin.headline: Run {{company}} without losing context
companyAdmin.description: A company admin view built for coordination, arbitration, and execution. Keep your people, sensitive projects, and critical alerts inside one focused cockpit.
companyAdmin.commandCenterSubtitle: Open the core workspaces you need to administer the company without scattered navigation.
companyAdmin.prioritySubtitle: Signals to handle first so the organization stays fluid.
companyAdmin.priorityCounterQuiet: No immediate blocker. You can focus on day-to-day operations.
companyAdmin.chartsSubtitle: Spot tension areas, internal coverage, and operational pressure at a glance.
companyAdmin.attentionSubtitle: Items that need arbitration stay visible before secondary actions.
companyAdmin.validationSubtitle: Validations and controls stay ahead of routine navigation.
companyAdmin.queueValidationDescription: {{count}} sensitive operation(s) are waiting for validation.
companyAdmin.queueProjectsDescription: {{count}} delayed project(s) and {{tasks}} overdue task(s) need a decision.
companyAdmin.organizationSubtitle: Headcount, structure, and profile data quality at a glance.
companyAdmin.departmentsEmpty: Departments will appear here once employee records are filled in.
companyAdmin.recentActivitySubtitle: Recent journal entries that help track internal actions and arbitration.
companyAdmin.technicalSubtitle: Quick verification of the modules tied to the admin space.
companyAdmin.signalHealthyDescription: No immediate critical alert. You can keep driving day-to-day operations.
companyAdmin.signalProfilesDescription: {{count}} employee profile(s) are still missing key information.
companyAdmin.signalSubscriptionDescription: The subscription reaches its end date in {{days}} day(s).
companyAdmin.projectSpotlightSubtitle: Projects that require immediate executive visibility.

companies.platformSubtitle: Handle onboarding requests, active accounts, and subscriptions without falling back to a raw admin screen.
companies.pendingSubtitle: Pending onboarding requests for super admin review.
companies.reviewQueueSubtitle: Pending onboarding requests stay first so validation work is handled before routine account management.
companies.reviewQueueUrgent: {{count}} request(s) need a super admin decision.
companies.reviewQueueQuiet: No urgent request right now. You can focus on the active portfolio.
companies.reviewGuidance: Add an internal note to frame the decision, then fill the matching reason if you request more information or reject the file.
companies.deleteConfirm: Delete this company? This is only allowed when no business data is linked to it.
companies.manualProvisioningSubtitle: Create a company directly when onboarding is handled outside the public portal.
companies.planLibrarySubtitle: Keep offers simple, readable, and easy to attach during manual provisioning.
companies.noPlans: No subscription plan is available yet.
companies.profileSubtitle: Review and update your company information.
companies.legalWorkspaceSubtitle: Review legal identity, contacts, and reference data without opening the editable company form.
companies.auditWorkspaceSubtitle: Inspect company status, contacts, and core records from a strict read-only control view.
companies.profileUpdateSubtitle: Keep here the information exposed to teams, partners, and operations.
companies.readOnlyHint: You have read-only access to the company profile. Updates are reserved for users with companies.manage.

users.platformSubtitle: Monitor accounts across every client company.
users.companySubtitle: Add staff, manage roles, and follow internal activity.
users.title: Company personnel
users.subtitle: Manage collaborators, assignments, and statuses from one direction-ready HR workspace.
users.createHint: Capture the core identity and staffing fields needed for an MVP-ready personnel profile.
users.directoryHint: Filter people by department, contract, status, or account type.
users.name: Name
users.attendanceInsightsHint: Attendance, lateness, and overtime consolidated from the attendance module.
users.leaveQueueHint: Requests to arbitrate and recently approved leave in one focused view.
users.organisationHint: Quickly spot the teams with the most active members.
users.contractHint: Review the contract types currently used in the company.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, employee number, job title, or department
users.emptyDirectory: No collaborator matches the selected filters.
users.catalogSubtitle: Pick a ready-to-use business profile to apply the right access scope and responsibilities.
users.formSubtitle: The selected profile pre-fills the job title, department, and recommended application roles.
users.listSubtitle: Quick view of collaborators, statuses, and linked application roles.
users.interactionsSubtitle: These relationships clarify who validates, coordinates, and executes daily work.
users.accessMatrixSubtitle: Fast view of the expected access level for each operational role.
users.noProfiles: No operational profile is currently available.
users.noManage: You have read-only access to this module. The catalog remains visible, but creation is limited to users with users.manage.
users.editHint: Update identity, position, and primary assignment without recreating the account.
users.organizationSubtitle: Directorates, services, and teams are now stored in the database and reusable across assignments.
users.noProfileSelected: No recognized profile for this collaborator.
users.mustChangePassword: Password must be changed at the next sign-in
users.passwordLengthError: The temporary password must be at least 8 characters long.

hrFile.title: Sensitive HR file
hrFile.subtitle: Keep contractual data, payroll details, and sensitive supporting documents together for this collaborator.
hrFile.contractHint: Keep hiring, offboarding, and responsibility level milestones visible.
hrFile.identityHint: These details stay restricted to HR and administration.
hrFile.payrollHint: The detailed payroll profile stays visible here without exposing these fields in employee self-service.
hrFile.activityHint: Review the latest events linked to this collaborator.
hrFile.noActivity: No recent activity is available for this file.

attendance.title: Attendance and field timekeeping
attendance.subtitle: Centralize daily attendance, lateness, and overtime in a business module linked to employees and projects.

filters.title: Filters
filters.subtitle: Frame the period, team, and project before reading the actual field data.

trend.subtitle: Quick read of the latest tracked days.
trend.empty: No trend is available for the selected period.

fieldOps.title: Site / team view
fieldOps.subtitle: Read attendance quickly by project, then switch to planning for scheduling and to projects for on-site delivery follow-up.
fieldOps.empty: No project attendance is available for this range yet.

team.title: Manager team snapshot
team.subtitle: The block below surfaces the latest attendance records for the most active team in range.
team.filteredSubtitle: You are now reading the latest attendance records for the selected site.
team.empty: No recent attendance record is available for this team view.

form.subtitle: Capture a presence, a confirmed absence, or correct an existing record.
form.autoMode: Presence derived from arrival / departure times

policy.title: Attendance policy
policy.subtitle: Define the baseline schedule and lateness / overtime thresholds.

records.title: Attendance journal
records.subtitle: Review daily records and correct field cases when needed.
records.empty: No attendance record matches the selected filters.

projects.title: Projects / contracts management
projects.subtitle: Manage the contract lifecycle, teams, planning, site journals, risks, change orders, and budget tracking from one delivery cockpit.
projects.projectIntakeSubtitle: Frame a new contract quickly, capture the essentials, then move straight into the delivery cockpit.
projects.commandCenterHint: Fast navigation from portfolio to finance, teams, performance, and documents without losing context.
projects.commandActiveProjectsHint: Open projects and filter completed or in-progress files.
projects.commandStaffHint: See collaborators and the projects they are assigned to.
projects.commandFinanceHint: Budget, expenses, revenue, margin, and trend.
projects.commandPerformanceHint: Financial objectives, execution, and schedule discipline.
projects.commandCompletedHint: Find finished and accepted projects quickly.
projects.globalFinanceHint: Consolidated budget, expense, revenue, and margin view for visible projects, with a steering period.
projects.globalFinanceRatioHint: Expense / budget ratio for the current scope.
projects.portfolioEvolutionHint: Progress over time for projects in the selected scope.
projects.staffProjectsHint: Each collaborator shows active project assignments; when a project is open, its assignments are also visible.
projects.teamPerformanceHint: The three best projects by global score, with budget, schedule, and execution reading.
projects.activeProjectsHint: List projects for the period, with filtering between in-progress and completed projects.
projects.recentDocumentsHint: Minutes, payment statements, reports, change orders, and other technical documents are listed with the details needed to identify them.
projects.recentDocumentsEmpty: No recent document is available yet.
projects.filterDocuments: Filter by reference, title, type, project, or uploader
projects.completedProjectsHint: Direct access to completed or finally accepted projects.
projects.completedProjectsEmpty: No completed project for this period.
projects.suggestionsHint: Profitability, team capacity, budget / progress alerts, and document flow are consolidated in one view.
projects.cockpitProfitabilityHint: Compare initial budget, actual cost, final margin, and budget variance to spot projects that weaken margin.
projects.cockpitCapacityHint: Collaborator workload based on active project assignments, with a quick read of available and overloaded people.
projects.cockpitBudgetAlertsHint: Projects are flagged when budget consumption is more than 10 points ahead of real progress.
projects.cockpitValidationHint: Reports, change orders, invoices, final reports, and acceptance documents are organized by processing step.
projects.noBudgetProgressAlert: No budget / progress alert in the current scope.
projects.noValidationItem: No item is in the validation flow yet.
projects.dashboardHint: Default module view: projects, people, assignments, alerts, and global finance.
projects.filterStaff: Filter by name, role, department, or project
projects.filterProjects: Filter by code, name, client, or location
projects.projectSignalsHint: Bars are based on every visible project.
projects.workspaceSubtitleChef: Coordinate teams, planning, site reporting, and technical follow-up from the project view.
projects.workspaceSubtitleWorker: See your tasks, instructions, and expected progress without navigating delivery management forms.
projects.myTasksSubtitle: Field instructions stay visible without pushing workers through management-heavy screens.
projects.myTasksEmpty: No task is currently assigned to you on this project.
projects.readOnlyHint: You have read-only access to projects. Delivery management forms remain limited to users with projects.manage.
projects.portfolioSubtitle: Select a file to move from the global view to a delivery-oriented project cockpit.
projects.rootPortfolioMessage: You are on the company's global project view: review the dashboard, then click a project to open its dedicated workspace.
projects.selectProject: Select a project to open the delivery cockpit.
projects.name: Project name
projects.workspaceDashboardHint: Project summary view to read status, progress, budget, and the most useful alerts at a glance.
projects.workspacePeopleChartHint: See active headcount, engaged profiles, and the day's workload on site.
projects.workspaceStockChartHint: Track material, equipment, and consumable allocations already tied to the project.
projects.workspaceDocumentsChartHint: Count technical files, reports, and change orders already published.
projects.workspaceDayPlanHint: Spot the tasks to start, deliver, or unblock today.
projects.workspaceAlertsFeedHint: The signals that need attention first without changing tabs.
projects.workspaceFinanceChartHint: Compare steering budget, expenses, revenue, and customer outstanding for the project.
projects.workspaceProgressChartHint: Compare real site progress against budget consumption.
projects.workspaceTasksChartHint: Break down tasks across waiting, execution, blocking, and completion.
projects.workspaceRisksChartHint: Logged risks are grouped by severity, with quick status visibility.
projects.workspaceOperationsChartHint: Project rhythm shows through assignments, reports, documents, change orders, budgets, and allocations.
projects.workspaceSnapshotSubtitle: Each block below represents a concrete management conversation: team, planning, field, budget, and documents.
projects.workspaceDayPlanEmpty: No priority tasks are scheduled for today.
projects.teamSectionHint: Assign the right profiles, clarify their role on site, and keep responsibilities visible.
projects.planningSectionHint: Structure phases, visualize dates, and adjust delivery rhythm before delays take over.
projects.ganttEmpty: No scheduled task with dates is available yet to render the Gantt view.
projects.siteSectionHint: Keep a clear thread of field reports, people on site, and notable daily events.
projects.riskSectionHint: Expose watchpoints, their severity, and the mitigation plan attached to each one.
projects.financeSectionHint: Track inflows, outflows, invoices, payroll and CFO validation for the project.
projects.stockSectionHint: Review allocations, stock families, and critical levels linked to this project.
projects.presenceSectionHint: Track work hours, absences and overtime for each site worker.
projects.docsSectionHint: Keep project documents, change orders, and attached resources in one place.

finance.title: Financial management
finance.subtitle: Track expenses, revenues, invoices, and collections.
finance.workspaceSubtitle: Focus on expenses, invoicing, treasury, and overdue receivables from one operational view.
finance.readOnlyHint: You have read-only access to finance. Entry forms are reserved for users with finance.manage.

inventory.title: Inventory management
inventory.subtitle: Manage stock movements, alerts, and material availability from a warehouse-focused workspace.
inventory.workspaceSubtitle: Track entries, exits, inventories, and pending validations close to daily operations.
inventory.readOnlyHint: You have read-only access to inventory. Entries and validations are limited to users with inventory.manage.
inventory.name: Item name

procurement.subtitle: Track tender watch, compliance checklist items, and DAO submissions.
procurement.workspaceSubtitle: Monitor target tenders, prepare submission files, and drive bid delivery from one cockpit.
procurement.legalWorkspaceSubtitle: Review requirements, clauses, and supporting evidence before submission or escalation.
procurement.readOnlyHint: You have read-only access to procurement. Entries and submissions are limited to users with procurement.manage.

recruitment.title: Recruitment
recruitment.subtitle: Track staffing needs, applications, and candidate matching from a practical HR cockpit.
recruitment.workspaceSubtitle: Centralize job offers, applications, profiles, and onboarding actions from one place.
recruitment.candidateWorkspaceSubtitle: Update your profile, target published openings, and track your own applications without entering the HR back office.
recruitment.readOnlyHint: You have read-only access to recruitment. Creation and updates are limited to users with recruitment.manage.
recruitment.createOfferHint: Create a workable job opening for the HR team, then publish it once the hiring need is approved.
recruitment.noOffers: No offer is available right now.
recruitment.selectedOfferSubtitle: Review and adjust the current opening without leaving the HR cockpit.
recruitment.emptySelectedOffer: Select an offer to display its detailed sheet.
recruitment.matchesPanelHint: Select an offer to generate or review the best available matches.
recruitment.noMatches: No matching result has been generated for this offer yet.
recruitment.candidateSearch: Search by candidate, email, or target role
recruitment.candidateSearchHint: Filter profiles to quickly surface the strongest candidates for the need.
recruitment.noCandidates: No candidate profile matches the current filter.
recruitment.applicationsForOfferHint: Select an offer first to focus the HR review.
recruitment.noApplicationsForOffer: No application is linked to the selected offer.
recruitment.myProfileSubtitle: Keep here the information used for your applications and matching score.
recruitment.profileRequired: Save your candidate profile before applying.

landing.heroTitle: Manage your projects, teams and inventory
landing.heroSubtitle: T-ERP centralizes projects, inventory, users, and financial operations in one multi-company platform.
landing.featuresTitle: All your tools in one platform
landing.featuresSubtitle: Built for an executable V1 for construction companies, T-ERP covers the core operating workflows first.

projects.title: Project management
projects.desc: Plan and track your projects, teams and progress reports in real time.

inventory.title: Inventory management
inventory.desc: Manage items, stock movements and project allocations.

finance.title: Financial management
finance.desc: Track expenses, revenues, invoices, and collections in one workspace.

companies.title: Multi-company
companies.desc: Manage multiple companies with complete data isolation and dedicated roles.

landing.ctaDesc: Join construction companies that trust T-ERP for their day-to-day operations.
landing.footerTagline: Multi-company ERP platform for construction businesses
